items.text: The U.S.-Qatar Domination of Gas Left the World Dangerously Exposed
items.summary: Before the war, the global market for liquefied natural gas was increasingly commanded by just two countries, one of which has now been hobbled.
items.text_it: Il dominio del gas degli Stati Uniti e del Qatar ha lasciato il mondo pericolosamente esposto
items.summary_it: Prima della guerra, il mercato globale del gas naturale liquefatto era sempre più dominato da soli due paesi, uno dei quali è ora zoppicante.

items.text: Can These ChatGPT Ads Make You Love A.I.?

items.text_it: Questi annunci ChatGPT possono farti amare l'INTELLIGENZA artificiale?
items.summary_it: Una campagna per ChatGPT si basa su commoventi vibrazioni retrò per vendere un prodotto che è diventato una fonte di preoccupazione per la maggior parte degli americani.

items.text: Stocks take a breather on Wednesday as torrid rally cools — putting potentially historic S&P 500 winning streak in jeopardy
items.summary: The powerful stock-market rally took a breather on Wednesday after a solid stretch of gains. As of the closing bell, the S&P 500 had wiped out its advance from earlier in the week, placing a lengthy weekly winning streak in jeopardy.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: ‘Squeezing more life out of every dollar’: How inflation is forcing a new reality on American families and amplifying the economy’s ‘K shape’
items.summary: Higher consumer prices are reining in spending among lower- and middle-income consumers, Fed’s beige book reports.
items.text_it: "Spremere più vita da ogni dollaro": come l'inflazione sta costringendo una nuova realtà sulle famiglie americane e amplificando la "forma a K" dell'economia
items.summary_it: I prezzi al consumo più elevati stanno frenando la spesa tra i consumatori a basso e medio reddito, riferisce il libro beige della Fed.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Oil settles at highest price in over a week. ‘Oil tanks are getting emptier each week Hormuz stays closed.’
items.summary: Oil futures settled Wednesday at their highest levels in more than a week, after the EIA reported a sixth straight weekly drop in U.S. commercial crude supplies and another big draw from the nation’s emergency oil reserve.
items.text_it: Il petrolio si assesta al prezzo più alto in oltre una settimana. "I serbatoi del petrolio si svuotano ogni settimana che Hormuz rimane chiusa."
items.summary_it: I futures sul petrolio si sono stabilizzati mercoledì ai livelli più alti in più di una settimana, dopo che l'EIA ha riportato un sesto calo settimanale consecutivo delle forniture commerciali di greggio degli Stati Uniti e un'altra grande attrazione dalla riserva petrolifera di emergenza della nazione.

items.text: Trump Administration Turns to a New Rationale to Justify Old Tariffs
items.summary: The administration has settled on a more legally and politically durable way to impose tariffs, but some say the focus on forced labor is merely a pretext for protectionism.

items.text: Trump Administration Fights Court Order to Refund Some Tariffs
items.summary: The administration has started to repay some of the money, but has signaled it may make it harder for certain businesses to claim the full amount they are owed.

items.text: Trump’s Iran war drains US oil stocks to lowest level since 2004
items.summary: Industry warns prices could soon jump as inventories reach ‘critically low’ threshold
items.text_it: La guerra di Trump in Iran drena le scorte petrolifere statunitensi al livello più basso dal 2004
items.summary_it: L'industria avverte che i prezzi potrebbero presto aumentare poiché le scorte raggiungono la soglia "criticamente bassa"

items.summary: Treasury secretary defends Donald Trump’s economic record amid mounting frustration over Iran war

items.text: Only 5% of day traders make money, but the SEC is now making it easier for more people to try it anyway
items.summary: The pattern day-trading rule is going away on June 4, but retail investors should understand the risks.
items.text_it: Solo il 5% dei day trader guadagna, ma la SEC ora sta rendendo più facile per più persone provarlo comunque
items.summary_it: La regola del day trading del modello scomparirà il 4 giugno, ma gli investitori al dettaglio dovrebbero comprendere i rischi.

items.text: Oil prices look to end at highest levels in over a week: ‘Oil tanks are getting emptier each week Hormuz stays closed’
items.summary: Oil futures were on track to settle Wednesday at their highest levels in more than a week, after the EIA reported a sixth straight weekly drop in U.S. commercial crude supplies and another big draw from the nation’s emergency oil reserve.
